name: GitHub Platform Guard
description: Protects GitHub via the gh CLI, API, and MCP server: repository deletion, release removal, deploy-key and webhook changes, secret deletion, and merging pull requests into the default branch. Derived from the destructive_command_guard pattern library.

rules.name: Require justification for gh repo delete
rules.description: gh repo delete permanently deletes a GitHub repository. This cannot be undone.

rules.name: Require justification for gh repo archive
rules.description: gh repo archive makes a repository read-only. While reversible, it stops all write access.

rules.name: Require justification for gh gist delete
rules.description: gh gist delete permanently deletes a Gist.

rules.name: Require justification for gh release delete
rules.description: gh release delete permanently deletes a release.

rules.name: Require justification for gh issue delete
rules.description: gh issue delete permanently deletes an issue.

rules.name: Require justification for gh ssh key delete
rules.description: gh ssh-key delete removes an SSH key, potentially breaking access.

rules.name: Require justification for gh secret delete
rules.description: gh secret delete removes GitHub Actions secrets.

rules.name: Require justification for gh variable delete
rules.description: gh variable delete removes GitHub Actions variables.

rules.name: Require justification for gh repo deploy key delete
rules.description: gh repo deploy-key delete removes a deploy key and can break access.

rules.name: Require justification for gh run cancel
rules.description: gh run cancel stops a workflow run and may interrupt deployments.

rules.name: Require justification for gh api delete actions secret
rules.description: gh api DELETE actions/secrets removes GitHub Actions secrets.

rules.name: Require justification for gh api delete actions variable
rules.description: gh api DELETE actions/variables removes GitHub Actions variables.

rules.name: Require justification for gh api delete hook
rules.description: gh api DELETE hooks removes repository webhooks.

rules.name: Require justification for gh api delete deploy key
rules.description: gh api DELETE keys removes deploy keys.

rules.name: Require justification for gh api delete release
rules.description: gh api DELETE releases removes GitHub releases.

rules.name: Require justification for gh api delete repo
rules.description: gh api DELETE calls can be destructive. Please verify the endpoint.

rules.name: Require access request for gh pr merge
rules.description: gh pr merge merges a pull request into its base branch (almost always the repository's default branch), bypassing any additional human sign-off on the merge itself. Requires admin approval before proceeding.

rules.name: Require access request for gh api merge pull request
rules.description: gh api PUT/POST .../pulls/{number}/merge merges a pull request via the raw API, bypassing gh's own confirmation prompts. Requires admin approval before proceeding.

rules.name: Require access request for GitHub MCP merge_pull_request
rules.description: The GitHub MCP server's merge_pull_request tool merges a pull request into its base branch (almost always the repository's default branch) on the agent's behalf, with no CLI confirmation step. Requires admin approval before proceeding.
